title: Sadokum stapeliiflorum
intro:
There is limited information available about Sadokum stapeliiflorum, it seems this plant may be a misspelling or an unknown plant. However I have located Stapelia stapeliiflora. 

Stapelia stapeliiflora, a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as a type of succulent or cactus-like plant. The health benefits of Stapelia stapeliiflora include its potential to have antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and may help to combat infections. The bioactive constituents of Stapelia stapeliiflora include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with Stapelia stapeliiflora include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
